---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file. -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# oncoscopR <a href="https://cttir.github.io/oncoscopR/"><img src="man/figures/logo.png" align="right" height="138" /></a>

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/CTTIR/oncoscopR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/CTTIR/oncoscopR/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/CTTIR/oncoscopR/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/CTTIR/oncoscopR)
[![Lifecycle: experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
<!-- badges: end -->

`oncoscopR` is an auditor live-evaluation dashboard for haematological
tumour centres. It reads tumour-documentation Excel spreadsheets and
computes:

* coverage and quality indicators (Tumorkonferenz, Psychoonkologie,
  Sozialdienst, HIV/Hepatitis screening, …);
* OPS-8-544 complex chemotherapy block counts;
* OPS-1-941 complex diagnostics counts (Morphologie,
  Immunphänotypisierung, Zytogenetik, Molekulargenetik);
* Kaplan-Meier curves for PFS and OS, per entity or grouped;
* Oncoprint tile plots for mutation profiles;
* a separate Zytogenetik view for structural findings.

A **fully synthetic example cohort** is bundled, so the dashboard can be
explored without any real patient data. Real data is never committed.

## Installation

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("CTTIR/oncoscopR")
```

## Quick start

```r
library(oncoscopR)

# Programmatic
path   <- onc_example_path()
cohort <- onc_read_cohort(path)
nrow(cohort)

# Interactive dashboard
onc_run_app()
```

In the running app, click **Beispieldaten laden** to load the bundled
synthetic cohort, or use the **fileInput** to upload your own
documentation workbook.

## Authors

* Hanno Witte (aut)
* Raban Heller (aut, cre — ORCID
  [0000-0001-8006-9742](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8006-9742))

## License

MIT.
